```{r}
#| label: partial_pool_model
#| cache: true

partial_pool_model <- brm(
  fatalities | trials(aboard) ~ year_scaled + (year_scaled | aircraft_manufacturer),
  data = crashes,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(1.4, 1), class = Intercept),      # Well-matched to data
    prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = b, coef = year_scaled),  # Weakly informative for trend
    prior(exponential(1), class = sd),              # Regularizes group variation
    prior(lkj(2), class = cor)                      # Weakly regularizes correlation
  ),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95),
  backend = "rstan",
  refresh = 0
)

summary(partial_pool_model)
```

## Model 3 Diagnostics

```{r}
#| label: partial_pool_model-diagnostics
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

# Posterior predictive check
pp_check(partial_pool_model, ndraws = 100, type = "dens_overlay") +
  labs(title = "Posterior Predictive Check: Model 3 (Manufacturer)")

# Trace plots
mcmc_plot(partial_pool_model, type = "trace", 
          variable = c("b_Intercept", "b_year_scaled", "sd_aircraft_manufacturer__Intercept"))
```

## Model 3 Results

```{r}
#| label: partial_pool_model-results
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8

# Extract random effects
ranef_partial_pool_model <- ranef(partial_pool_model)

# Get manufacturer effects
manufacturer_effects <- ranef_partial_pool_model$aircraft_manufacturer %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("manufacturer") %>%
  arrange(Estimate.Intercept)

# Plot all manufacturers
manufacturer_effects %>%
  mutate(manufacturer = fct_reorder(manufacturer, Estimate.Intercept)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Estimate.Intercept, y = manufacturer)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Q2.5.Intercept, xmax = Q97.5.Intercept), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Manufacturer-Specific Fatality Rate Deviations",
       subtitle = "Deviations from overall mean fatality rate",
       x = "Deviation from Mean (logit scale)", 
       y = "Manufacturer") +
  theme_minimal()

# Compare fixed effects
posterior3 <- as_draws_df(partial_pool_model)

posterior3 %>%
  select(b_Intercept, b_year_scaled) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "parameter", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value, y = parameter)) +
  stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Posterior Distributions: Model 3 (Fixed Effects)",
       x = "Parameter Value", y = "Parameter")
```

## Visualize Group-Level Variation

```{r}
#| label: partial_pool_model-variation
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

# Extract group-level SD
sd_manufacturer <- posterior3 %>%
  select(sd_aircraft_manufacturer__Intercept) %>%
  pull()

# Plot distribution
data.frame(sd = sd_manufacturer) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sd)) +
  stat_halfeye() +
  labs(title = "Group-Level Standard Deviation",
       subtitle = "Variation in fatality rates across manufacturers",
       x = "Standard Deviation (logit scale)", y = "Density")

# Summary statistics
cat("Group-level SD:\n",
    sprintf("Mean: %.3f\n", mean(sd_manufacturer)),
    sprintf("Median: %.3f\n", median(sd_manufacturer)),
    sprintf("95%% CI: [%.3f, %.3f]\n", 
            quantile(sd_manufacturer, 0.025), 
            quantile(sd_manufacturer, 0.975)),
    sep = "")

# Interpret
baseline_rate <- plogis(0)
low_manufacturer <- plogis(-2 * mean(sd_manufacturer))
high_manufacturer <- plogis(2 * mean(sd_manufacturer))

cat(sprintf("\nImplied fatality rate range (±2 SD):\n"),
    sprintf("Baseline: %.1f%%\n", 100 * baseline_rate),
    sprintf("Safe manufacturer (-2 SD): %.1f%%\n", 100 * low_manufacturer),
    sprintf("Dangerous manufacturer (+2 SD): %.1f%%\n", 100 * high_manufacturer),
    sep = "")
```
